commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5dca05421f07fec15d9ac9a7d399cad23fe77bda)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `clawhub sync` to recover from selected skill slug-conflict publish failures, continue later uploads, report partial failure with a nonzero exit code, and add sync regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main awaits `cmdPublish` directly inside the selected-skill loop, and `cmdPublish` rethrows backend slug-conflict errors, so one selected conflict aborts the rest. I did not run a live registry sync in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The contributor should address the P2 classifier gap and add redacted real CLI proof before maintainer merge review; the missing external proof gate is not automation-repairable.

target.title: fix(clawhub): continue sync after slug conflicts
target.body:
## Summary
- catch known slug-conflict publish failures per selected skill during `clawhub sync`
- continue uploading later selected skills after a recoverable slug conflict
- report partial success with a non-zero exit code while preserving unrelated publish failures
- add regression coverage for direct and alias slug-conflict cases

Fixes #868

## Validation
- `bun run test:src src/cli/commands/sync.test.ts`
- `bun run verify:build`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run lint`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
target.author: pragnyanramtha

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
